normalization_notes: Treat the product as 13 modules; module numbering has no M11.
M4 is a cross-cutting Academic Directory & Expertise Registry, not only an applicant profile page.
Conference application and grant application are separate records even when they reuse the same application/review/decision backbone.
Applicants must not see internal decisions until decision.release_status = released.
Public scholar profiles should use /scholars/:slug as the primary public route and GET /api/v1/scholars/:slug as the primary read contract.
Global authenticated roles are applicant | reviewer | organizer | admin; conference/grant staff capability is scoped via conference_staff rather than separate global roles.
Feature delivery should follow harness discipline: read handoff artifacts, run smoke tests, complete one scoped feature, then leave a clean state.

features.title: Set up progress log and sprint contract templates
features.description: Create the project artifacts that let future sessions pick up work quickly and consistently.
steps: Create progress log template
Create sprint contract template
Document how to update them at the end of a session
Verify another teammate can understand the templates without verbal explanation
done_definition: Artifact exists in repo
Team can use it without additional explanation

features.title: Create init/smoke-test checklist for each coding session
features.description: Before building new features, every session should verify the app is in a clean working state.
steps: Start the local environment
Verify home page loads
Verify login page loads
Verify conference list or fixture page loads
Record smoke-test result in progress log
done_definition: Artifact exists in repo
Team can use it without additional explanation

features.title: Adopt feature-list.json as the source of task truth
features.description: All implementation work should map to structured features and only flip passes after real verification.
steps: Review the feature list JSON
Select the highest-priority unfinished feature
Write or confirm the sprint contract
Implement only that feature
Mark passes true only after e2e verification
done_definition: Artifact exists in repo
Team can use it without additional explanation

harness_principles.title: Use structured feature JSON as the task source of truth
harness_principles.applied_here: Keep this file stable and machine-readable; delivery sessions should primarily flip status/passes and avoid ad hoc scope drift.

harness_principles.title: Make incremental progress one feature at a time
harness_principles.applied_here: Prefer one feature per branch and one clearly scoped session goal, rather than mixing multiple partially finished changes.

harness_principles.title: Start each session by getting bearings and running a smoke test
harness_principles.applied_here: Read the progress log, recent commit/change history, and this feature list before new implementation; run the init/smoke checklist first.

harness_principles.title: Leave structured handoff artifacts and a clean mergeable state
harness_principles.applied_here: Every completed session should update progress notes, preserve route/API/schema decisions, and avoid handing off broken intermediate states.

harness_principles.title: Separate building from evaluation when judgment is subjective or high risk
harness_principles.applied_here: Demo/UI-heavy features and permission-sensitive flows should be checked by a distinct verifier or QA pass before passes=true.
